content:
- [feedback_build_runner.md](feedback_build_runner.md) — build_runner can't run on Flutter 3.41.6/Dart 3.11.4; must manually edit tables.g.dart and schema_versions.dart
- [project_reimbursement.md](project_reimbursement.md) — Reimbursement tracking feature status and what's been implemented

name: build_runner broken on Flutter 3.41.6
description: build_runner fails because Dart 3.11.4 removed frontend_server.dart.snapshot (JIT); must manually update generated files
type: feedback
---

`dart run build_runner build` fails with "Could not find a command named frontend_server.dart.snapshot" on Flutter 3.41.6 / Dart 3.11.4. Only `frontend_server_aot.dart.snapshot` exists.

**Why:** Flutter 3.41.6 (Dart 3.11.4) dropped JIT frontend server. build_runner 2.4.x uses frontend_server_client 3

name: Reimbursement Tracking Feature
description: Status of the reimbursement tracking feature implementation in Cashew
type: project
---

Reimbursement tracking feature is fully implemented and compiles cleanly.

**What's done:**
- DB schema v47: added `isReimbursable` (bool), `reimbursableAmount` (double), `reimbursedAmount` (double) to Transactions table
- Migration 46→47 in `tables.dart` `stepByStep()`
- `netAmount()` helper in `tables.dart` computes `amount + reimbursedAmount` — used in all
File unknown was edited 45 times this session — likely a hot path worth monitoring.
